summary: Tested TIER 2 (card content rework) + TIER 3 (sort chips + Open Now toggle) on Bookvia search page. Backend (4/4) and Frontend (13/13) checks passed. Service chips show real prices, CTA is 'Ver disponibilidad', sort chips reorder, Open Now toggle filters client-side, filter-sort removed from sidebar. Map view and 'Cerca de ti' regression OK.

issues: Google Maps console error 'RefererNotAllowedMapError' for the preview domain — pre-existing config (not regressed by this iter). Map renders but with watermark warning. The REACT_APP_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY needs the preview hostname added to authorized referers.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Add preview/prod domains to Google Maps API key referer allowlist to remove RefererNotAllowedMapError noise.
critical_code_review_comments: BusinessCard.jsx line 160: min_price fallback uses 299. With backend now returning real min_price, fallback is fine for legacy/empty top_services rows.

SearchPage.jsx: openNow filter is purely client-side over `businesses` array — businesses without is_open_now (null) will be excluded. Verified: when open-now is toggled with no truly-open businesses, header correctly shows '0 resultados · abiertos ahora'. Acceptable.
businesses.py line 713-733: bulk service fetch limits to 2000 across all biz_ids — could be tight for large pages but adequate at limit=20.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 5 MX businesses including 'Test Real Stripe' (3 services starting $150).
verified_checks: GET /api/businesses?country_code=MX&limit=5 returns top_services (max 3, ASC by price) and min_price
Test Real Stripe returns 3 services starting at $150 MXN, min_price=150
Frontend cards show services-chips-{id} with formatCurrency prices like 'Corte de cabello · $150.00'
min_price comes from real services ('Desde $150.00' on Test Real Stripe, not 299 fallback)
sort-chips-row visible with open-now-chip + 5 sort chips (relevance/nearest/rating/reviews/newest)
Click open-now-chip -> emerald-600 active, header appends ' · abiertos ahora', client-side filter applied
Click open-now-chip again -> toggles off, all results return
filter-sort REMOVED from sidebar (data-testid=filter-sort no longer exists)
Map view toggle renders results-map-view with side list
'Cerca de ti' (nearby-button) is present and clickable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Search page redesign TIER 2+3 verified end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_search_chips_redesign.py is reusable. Note: Google Maps API key has RefererNotAllowedMapError on preview domain (pre-existing, non-blocking). When testing search, set localStorage 'bookvia-country'='MX' before navigating, otherwise country defaults differ.
